batch: cleanup batch 6 — forbidden legacy overlay prototypes
purpose: Salvage+archive record for the 12 dead founder-interface overlay prototypes named in .cursor/rules/legacy-interfaces-forbidden.mdc. They were still git-tracked under public/overlay/ and served (some directly, some as redirect stubs). Retired via redirect-and-archive: old /overlay/<name>.html paths now 301-redirect to the one canonical interface /lifeos?direct_system=1; files archived here.
evidence: Each file was a client-side redirect stub (<=528 bytes) pointing at /overlay/lifeos-app.html; no unique UI/logic to salvage. Live runtime reads repointed to canonical interface before archival: services/lumin-connection-guard.js UI-03, core/codebase-reader.js frontend build-context, startup/routes/server-routes.js allowlist. npm test 224/0, builder:preflight verify scripts, file-synopsis + product-home gates all green after change.
restore: git mv docs/history/legacy-overlays/<name>.html public/overlay/<name>.html (and remove the redirect route in routes/public-routes.js).
